messages.content:
You are a structured support-ticket extraction assistant.
Return only valid JSON that follows the schema exactly.
Use null for unknown customer fields.
Use [] when the customer did not request any explicit action.
Do not add keys that are not defined by the schema.

Schema name: support_ticket_extraction
Schema version: 1.0.0
Top-level JSON object fields:
- summary: string
- issue_category: billing | account_access | technical_bug | feature_request | integration | general_question | other
- priority: low | medium | high | urgent
- product_area: web_app | mobile_app | api | billing_portal | account_portal | integrations | other | unknown
- customer: object with fields name, account_id, plan_tier
- customer.plan_tier: free | pro | business | enterprise | null
- sentiment: negative | neutral | positive | mixed
- requires_human_followup: boolean
- actions_requested: list[string]

Extract the support ticket into the schema described above.

Ticket text:
Subject: Duplicate invoice charge

Hi support, I'm Ava Cole from account AC-100 on the Pro plan. Our April invoice was charged twice in the billing portal after I updated the card on file. Please refund the duplicate charge and confirm that auto-pay is still active.

{
  "actions_requested": [
    "Refund the duplicate April invoice charge",
    "Confirm that auto-pay is still enabled"
  ],
  "customer": {
    "account_id": "AC-100",
    "name": "Ava Cole",
    "plan_tier": "pro"
  },
  "issue_category": "billing",
  "priority": "high",
  "product_area": "billing_portal",
  "requires_human_followup": true,
  "sentiment": "negative",
  "summary": "Customer reports a duplicate invoice charge after updating billing details and wants a refund plus billing confirmation."
}

Ticket text:
I am Ben Ortiz, admin for account BIZ-204. I was locked out of the account portal after the MFA reset yesterday and the backup codes are no longer accepted. We have a customer rollout in two hours, so please restore admin access and reset MFA enrollment as soon as possible.

{
  "actions_requested": [
    "Restore admin access",
    "Reset MFA enrollment"
  ],
  "customer": {
    "account_id": "BIZ-204",
    "name": "Ben Ortiz",
    "plan_tier": "business"
  },
  "issue_category": "account_access",
  "priority": "urgent",
  "product_area": "account_portal",
  "requires_human_followup": true,
  "sentiment": "negative",
  "summary": "Business admin is locked out after an MFA reset and needs urgent account restoration before a rollout."
}

Ticket text:
Hello team, Priya Shah from ENT-778 here. Since the iOS update this morning, the mobile app crashes every time our field reps open the offline sync screen. Can you investigate the crash logs and let us know whether there is an active incident? We can work around it for a few hours, but it blocks demos.

{
  "actions_requested": [
    "Investigate the iOS crash logs",
    "Confirm whether there is an active incident"
  ],
  "customer": {
    "account_id": "ENT-778",
    "name": "Priya Shah",
    "plan_tier": "enterprise"
  },
  "issue_category": "technical_bug",
  "priority": "high",
  "product_area": "mobile_app",
  "requires_human_followup": true,
  "sentiment": "mixed",
  "summary": "Enterprise customer reports an iOS crash on the offline sync screen and requests investigation plus incident confirmation."
}

Ticket text:
We're evaluating your API for an upcoming integration. It would be helpful if webhook subscriptions could be filtered by environment and event type instead of receiving everything. No rush, I mainly want to know if that feature is on the roadmap.

Ticket text:
Our Salesforce connector has started replaying failed sync jobs for about thirty minutes after we rotate OAuth credentials. I'm Marta Silva on account INT-442. Could you share the retry guidance or best practice for credential rotation? The integration eventually recovers, so this is not a sev-1.

Ticket text:
Quick question from Jordan Lee. I am on the free plan and using the web app trial workspace. Where can I download prior receipts without upgrading? If there is a help article, just point me to it. Thanks for the solid onboarding flow so far.

Ticket text:
We accidentally created a duplicate workspace during migration and now some usage credits are split across both environments. The second workspace only exists because of our import script. Please close the duplicate workspace and transfer any remaining credits if possible.

{
  "actions_requested": [
    "Close the duplicate workspace",
    "Transfer any remaining credits"
  ],
  "customer": {
    "account_id": null,
    "name": null,
    "plan_tier": null
  },
  "issue_category": "other",
  "priority": "medium",
  "product_area": "other",
  "requires_human_followup": true,
  "sentiment": "mixed",
  "summary": "User requests cleanup of a duplicate workspace created during migration and wants remaining credits moved."
}
